changeSet.author: mosque-crm
changeSet.comment: Enable tenant-scoped role names and seed tenant copies of ADMIN and MEMBER from global templates (mosque_id IS NULL).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE roles DROP INDEX name;

INSERT INTO roles (name, description, is_system_role, created_at, mosque_id) SELECT gr.name, gr.description, FALSE, NOW(), m.id FROM mosques m JOIN roles gr ON gr.mosque_id IS NULL AND gr.name IN ('ADMIN', 'MEMBER') LEFT JOIN roles tr ON tr.mosque_id = m.id AND tr.name = gr.name WHERE tr.id IS NULL;

INSERT IGNORE INTO role_permissions (role_id, permission_id, created_at) SELECT tr.id, rp.permission_id, NOW() FROM roles tr JOIN roles gr ON gr.name = tr.name AND gr.mosque_id IS NULL JOIN role_permissions rp ON rp.role_id = gr.id WHERE tr.mosque_id IS NOT NULL AND tr.name IN ('ADMIN', 'MEMBER');

INSERT IGNORE INTO role_assignable_permissions (role_id, permission_id, created_at) SELECT tr.id, rap.permission_id, NOW() FROM roles tr JOIN roles gr ON gr.name = tr.name AND gr.mosque_id IS NULL JOIN role_assignable_permissions rap ON rap.role_id = gr.id WHERE tr.mosque_id IS NOT NULL AND tr.name IN ('ADMIN', 'MEMBER');

INSERT IGNORE INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id, mosque_id, start_date, end_date) SELECT ur.user_id, tr.id, COALESCE(ur.mosque_id, u.mosque_id), ur.start_date, ur.end_date FROM user_roles ur JOIN users u ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles gr ON gr.id = ur.role_id AND gr.mosque_id IS NULL AND gr.name IN ('ADMIN', 'MEMBER') JOIN roles tr ON tr.name = gr.name AND tr.mosque_id = u.mosque_id WHERE u.mosque_id IS NOT NULL;
DELETE ur FROM user_roles ur JOIN users u ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles gr ON gr.id = ur.role_id AND gr.mosque_id IS NULL AND gr.name IN ('ADMIN', 'MEMBER') WHERE u.mosque_id IS NOT NULL;
